name: SymbolElement
summary: The SymbolElement class represents a symbol in the Tekla Structures symbol library.

constructors.name: SymbolElement()
constructors.summary: Creates a new symbol element instance with the default symbol.

constructors.name: SymbolElement(SymbolInfo)
constructors.summary: Creates a new symbol element instance with the given symbol.

constructors.name: SymbolElement(SymbolInfo, DrawingColors, Double)
constructors.signature: public SymbolElement(SymbolInfo Symbol, DrawingColors Color, double Height)
constructors.summary: Creates a new symbol element instance with the given symbol, color and height.

params.name: Color
params.doc: The symbol color to be used.

params.name: Height
params.doc: The symbol height (mm) to be used.

constructors.name: SymbolElement(SymbolInfo, TeklaDrawingColor, Double)
constructors.signature: public SymbolElement(SymbolInfo Symbol, TeklaDrawingColor Color, double Height)
constructors.summary: Creates a new symbol element instance with the given symbol, the RGB color and height.

params.name: Color
params.doc: The symbol color to be used as a true RGB color.

params.name: Height
params.doc: The symbol height (mm) to be used.

methods.name: GetUnformattedString
methods.summary: Returns the content as a string without formatting.

returns.doc: The content as a string without formatting.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: Color
properties.summary: This property is the symbol color.

properties.name: TrueColor
properties.summary: The true color (rgb enabled) of the symbol.
